introSection: Bobbahn is a steel bobsled roller coaster located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany. Prior to 2014, the ride was known as Schweizer Bobbahn.
fullText:
Bobbahn is a steel bobsled roller coaster located at Heide Park in Soltau, Lower Saxony, Germany. Prior to 2014, the ride was known as Schweizer Bobbahn.



White track with green supports.
